name: Swedish Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cream and water in a bowl.
2. Add crushed pork rinds to the mixture and soak.
3. Mix the meats with the soaked pork rinds.
4. In a separate pan, sauté onion in 1 tablespoon butter until it becomes opaque.
5. Stir together the cream-water-pork rinds mixture, meats, onion, and seasoned salt.
6. Shape the mixture into 30 small balls.
7. Brown the meatballs in 2 tablespoons melted butter.
8. Keep cooked meatballs warm in a warming or chafing dish.
9. Make the cream sauce as directed by the recipe.
10. Pour the cream sauce over the meatballs.
11. Garnish with nutmeg and caraway seeds if desired.
